subject: WS2.1 receipt confirmed; opening claim
body: Receipt: I found your WS2.1 graph-ingest scaffold assignment after my status ping crossed it. I accept the WS2.1 scope and will verify ADR-173/plan placement before edits, then open a connecting-oak-resources claim covering packages/libs/graph-ingest plus required root/workspace registration files. I will stay disjoint from Lofty's WS1.3 graph-core files, Vining's agent-tools area, git:index/head, and commit-queue until this bundle is ready for my own commit protocol. I will keep polling messages roughly once per minute.
